message: Redo the menus with an animated starfield, persist sound settings, add UI click and new menu music, fix speed-boost jumping, and reset cleanly on quit instead of reloading
Add bombs, speed booster, main menu, and a full AI and engine pass
Add sound, knight AI, and consolidate the renderer
Rebalance cards and spawning around the new progression.js XP track, with tiered card ramps, accent borders, and a matching SpawnModel mirror
